query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplierName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.monthlyCost,
  c.name as customerName,
  c.externalId as customerExternalId,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue,
  COUNT(sba.id) as assignmentCount,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin,
  ROUND((SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.description ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') as billingDescriptions,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.invoiceNumber SEPARATOR ',') as invoiceNumbers
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, s.monthlyCost, c.name, c.externalId
HAVING margin < 0
ORDER BY margin ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplierName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.monthlyCost,
  c.name as customerName,
  c.externalId as customerExternalId,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue,
  COUNT(sba.id) as assignmentCount,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin,
  ROUND((SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.description ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') as billingDescriptions,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.invoiceNumber SEPARATOR ',') as invoiceNumbers
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, s.monthlyCost, c.name, c.externalId
HAVING margin < 0
ORDER BY margin ASC
LIMIT 100;
